items.title: Self-supervised learning pipeline
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  raw["Unlabeled raw data"]
  pretext["Pretext task\n(split input + pseudo-label)"]
  train["Pretrain model\n(minimize pretext loss)"]
  repr["Learned representation"]
  down["Downstream task\n(fine-tune or probe)"]
  raw --> pretext --> train --> repr --> down
items.caption: SSL converts unlabeled data into a prediction problem, learns representations during pretraining, then adapts to real tasks.

items.title: Where SSL sits among learning paradigms
items.mermaid:
flowchart TB
  sup["Supervised\nhuman labels"]
  ssl["Self-supervised\nlabels from data"]
  unsup["Unsupervised\nstructure without pretext"]
  sup --> ssl
  ssl --> unsup
items.caption: SSL uses unlabeled inputs like unsupervised learning but always defines a prediction loss on pseudo-labels, closer in mechanics to supervised training.

items.title: Masked language modeling pretext
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  sent["The cat sat on the mat"]
  mask["The cat MASK on the mat"]
  pred["Predict: sat"]
  sent --> mask --> pred
items.caption: The masked token is both hidden from input and used as the pseudo-label during training.
